reviews.review_description:
I am not sure if you've just ported this game from PCVR to Quest, but it's very annoying that it has a terrible bat alignment. I couldn't find any comfortable way of holding the controller in which I could grip the bat well.

The fielders are stopping the ball by diving from literally 2 meters away. 

Bat's scale is totally unrealistic. 

Too much spin turn even with beginner difficulty.

The whole delivery is readable (in terms of speed) until the ball lands on ground. Then it just goes with super speed, which is totally weird.

developer_response.body:
Hi,

Thanks for your feedback.

With regards to bat alignment, if you are right handed please play using the left controller - hold the handle of the left controller with your left hand with the sensor ring pointing downwards.
I hope this enhances your playing experience.

We find your other feedback to be valuable as well, and will incorporate these changes in our next update.

Many thanks.

reviews.review_description: I have been playing cover drive cricket without any issue and thought ok lets try a new game also and the literally you can not hold the bat ,its like not the natural posture for holding,i tried 2-3 times but failed to hold it.

developer_response.body: Hi, if you are right handed please play using the left controller - hold the handle of the left controller with your left hand with the sensor ring pointing downwards.

reviews.review_description: Has some good potential to be  fully developed. Enjoy the basic gameplay can be repetitive

developer_response.body: Many thanks for your positive comment and feedback. We will be releasing an update with additional features and several upgrades shortly.

reviews.review_description: Awesome experience ☺️ playing like in real stadium.
Good to play in own ground. 👍🏻
